documents.content: Karte profile memory fact: the user is wearing a red color t-shirt. This short-lived personal fact should be retrievable without resending the whole conversation.
Karte profile memory fact: the user prefers Cloudflare-first deployment and wants cheaper retrieval instead of sending the entire conversation every turn.

Repository: acme/widgets

Summary: Widget framework.

README:
The README documents adapters, recipes, plugin APIs, and holographic scheduler webhooks. The holographic scheduler webhooks phrase appears only in the README body.

Repository: acme/runner

Summary: Automation runner.

README:
This project uses deterministic queue leases for incremental repository sync and retryable README ingestion.
